summary: Frontend-only verification of two new NEXUS features: (1) live Gemini-powered AI Chat on the public launch site, and (2) Pilot Leads sub-tab in the admin Governance Console. All 6 requested flows PASSED end-to-end via Playwright with cookie-based auth.
critical_code_review_comments: Landing.jsx uses an iframe to isolate marketing CSS/JS — good. Iframe communicates with API on same origin, so cookies/CORS are fine.
PilotLeadsPanel exposes proper data-testids (gov-tab-pilot, gov-pilot-leads, pilot-refresh, pilot-export-csv) — meets testability requirements.
Consider adding a data-testid to the launch pilot form / chat input for future stable selection (currently only #id selectors).
test_credentials: admin@nexus.io / nexus123 (JWT via httpOnly cookie from POST /api/auth/login)
seed_data_creation: Submitted pilot form with qa-pilot@nexus.io — persisted to backend and visible in the Pilot Leads admin table after refresh.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Landing page ('/') renders <iframe data-testid='launch-landing-frame' src='/launch/index.html'>. To interact with pilot form/chat, use `await iframe_el.content_frame()`. Console Login and 'Open the live console' links use target=_top -> /dashboard. Login form exposes plain input[type=email]/password + button[type=submit]. Live chat mode confirmed: chatNote shows 'Connected to live Nexus AI.' and Gemini returns substantive multi-sentence answers (~1-3s). Rate limit is 8/min per IP so keep chat POSTs low. Pilot Leads panel showed 3 rows after adding qa-pilot@nexus.io (2 seeded + 1 new). Storefront still renders Florida (FL) leads (regression OK).
verified_flows: PASS: '/' renders LeadGen Virtual Hub iframe with src /launch/index.html; Console Login + 'Open the live console' both href='/dashboard' target=_top.
PASS: Landing AI Chat -> POST /api/chat returns mode 'live'; chatNote='Connected to live Nexus AI.'; assistant reply is substantive Gemini output (~350+ chars, not canned).
PASS: /dashboard login with admin@nexus.io/nexus123 succeeds; Governance nav item (data-testid=nav-admin) present.

PASS: Governance > Pilot Leads (gov-tab-pilot) renders panel (gov-pilot-leads) with Refresh + Export CSV buttons and shows seeded rows cto@fintechco.com / FintechCo and ops@legalfirm.com / Legal Firm LLC (source=launch_site).

PASS: Waitlist round-trip — submitted qa-pilot@nexus.io on public pilot form (#pilotForm); formNote confirmed 'Pilot request received.'; after admin Refresh, row appears in Pilot Leads table (3 rows total).
PASS: Regression — Overview loads (nav-overview) and Intel Marketplace/Storefront still shows Florida (FL) HQ leads.
